introduction: In this presentation, we will assess our current customer service operations, with a focus on accessibility and availability for customers. Our aim is to ensure we are providing optimal support for our customers.

subsections.heading: Elexion's Current Customer Service Infrastructure
subsections.content:
• Our customer service department consists of 400 trained professionals
• We have implemented an AI-powered chatbot to address common customer queries
• Our customer service department is divided into front-office and back-office operations
• We use a CRM system to track customer interactions and ensure a seamless experience
• We have a dedicated team that handles customer complaints and escalations
• Our customer service processes are ISO 9001:2015 certified for quality management
subsections.justification: This slide provides general information about Elexion's customer service infrastructure but doesn't specify their hours of operation.

subsections.heading: Availability of Live Customer Service Representatives
subsections.content:
• Our customer service representatives undergo a rigorous 6-week training program
• We have a performance management system in place to monitor and improve service quality
• Our representatives are equipped to handle enquiries in English, Spanish, and French
• We have a customer satisfaction rate of 87% for live interactions
• Our representatives handle an average of 90 calls per day
• We have a system in place to rotate representatives to prevent burnout and ensure consistent service quality
subsections.justification: While this slide discusses the availability of customer service representatives, it doesn't provide details about their working hours.

subsections.heading: Enhancing Customer Engagement Strategies
subsections.content:
• We have implemented a customer loyalty program to increase retention rates
• We are exploring the use of AR/VR technology for virtual showroom experiences
• We regularly conduct customer surveys to understand their needs and expectations
• We have a quarterly newsletter to keep customers updated about our latest offerings
• We plan to launch a mobile app to provide a comprehensive digital experience
• We are planning to conduct customer engagement events in key markets in Q3 2021
subsections.justification: This slide discusses strategies for enhancing customer engagement but doesn't provide any information about Elexion's customer service hours.

conclusion: As we strive for excellence in our customer service, it is essential that we ensure its availability around the clock. Let's explore ways to enhance our customer engagement strategies to meet this objective.

image_queries.slide_title: Availability of Live Customer Service Representatives
